description: Pavlovian-Instrumental Transfer (Rescorla & Solomon, 1967): instrumental training (operant baseline), Pavlovian CS-US training (off-baseline), transfer test (CS probes superimposed on operant baseline). Specific or general transfer is inferred from the rate modulation at test.
input:
@cs(label="tone", duration=30s, modality="auditory")
@us(label="pellet", delivery="unsignaled")

phase instrumental:
  sessions = 10
  VI30s

phase pavlovian:
  sessions = 5
  Pair.ForwardDelay(tone, pellet, isi=30s, cs_duration=30s)

phase transfer_test:
  sessions = 2
  use instrumental
_note: Specific vs. general transfer is discriminated by whether the test uses the same US identity as the Pavlovian pairing (specific) or a different reinforcer class (general). This fixture expresses the canonical same-US variant.
